creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Created attachment 237361
patch to update the port to 1.17.3 and add a vuxml entry

Update gitea to 1.17.3

This release fixes three security issues, a large number of bugs and contains some enhancements.

Release notes: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/releases/tag/v1.17.3
